violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not properly working at the hand washing lavatory in the kitchen and food prep area.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Observed personal phones and bluetooth speakers being used on the prep top cooler cutting boards.

EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Observed empolyee in dish room loading soiled dishes and equipment into dish machine and then proceeded to unload clean sanitized utensils without proper handwashing and glove changing.
